source_pr.title: *: move parser to a separate repository
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/7923, finally

After this commit, we will be able to handle https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/7922

### What is changed and how it works?

* remove parser related package from TiDB
* update package link to ref the "github.com/pingcap/parser"
* update Makefile, remove parser related
* update vendor to import "github.com/pingcap/parser"


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - No code

@jackysp @XuHuaiyu

fix_pattern: *: move parser to a separate repository
